dualSummary.note: 样本外（赛前预测 vs 实际完赛）。样本量小，仅作滚动起点；随赛程推进自动累积。Brier 越低越好(0~2)，三路盲猜≈0.667。

plans.title: 世界杯专题，比利时🇧🇪VS伊朗🇮🇷。

expert.name: 山城唐老师
expert.desc: 数学老师，善于分析比赛数据和趋势，帮助人们做出更明智的投注决策。

plans.content:
小日子又又又拿下，世界杯还在连红！


老规矩；

先点赞；

再收看！


明天比利时对伊朗这场球，G组的生死局。四队首轮全平，谁赢谁出线占先机。如果从基本面出发比利时纸面实力强出一大截，但你如果要说比利时就能稳拿捏几个进去，说实话我还真不太赞同。一球过关，甚至平局都不算意外。


比利时黄金一代已经是快落幕了，从进攻端来看是真便秘。首轮打埃及，全场控球压着打，结果靠对方乌龙才1-1扳平，德布劳内除了定位球现在也没啥威胁。最近3场世界杯正赛没赢过，锋线转化率低得可怜。全队身价5亿多欧，可进球就靠卢卡库、多库这些哥们的灵光一现，碰上铁桶阵经常没辙。

别忘了，多库这场也上不了。


再看伊朗，顶着大题材来参赛，大家也都知道怎么个事儿。

首轮落后新西兰两次，2-2追平，塔雷姆和莫赫比脚头都挺热。这支球队防守纪律性很强，摆起大巴来，比利时还真不好凿。虽然伊朗驻地搬到了墨西哥，赛前才来，打完还得走，些许折腾。但伊朗人的韧性在那儿摆着，虽然世界杯历史上对欧洲球队最近10场只赢1场，但很少被血洗。


数据方面来看，比利时些许燥热。但Opta给比利时的胜率，并没有支撑赢两球以上的勇气。

结合比利时攻坚乏力、伊朗全员退守反击的特点，老唐觉得这场球大概率是比利时场面占优，破门乏术的场面。就算比利时赢了，也最多一个球的差距。

反正比利时想赢两球以上，难。

plans.title: 【每日公推】昨日世界杯4推全中！今天带来世界杯乌拉圭vs佛得角，祝大家好运！
plans.matchZh: 乌拉圭 vs 佛得角

expert.name: 柯经纬
expert.desc: 10余年足球实战经验，曾为足球专栏长期供稿。

plans.content:
乌拉圭在阿根廷教练贝尔萨的带领下虽然成功晋级世界杯正赛，但是近期他们的表现十分低迷，特别是进攻端表现十分乏力。要知道“疯子”教练贝尔萨是出了名擅长调教进攻的主教练，但是过去7场比赛中他们仅仅打进6球，究其原因我认为是他们如今进攻端真的无人可用，所以本届赛事乌拉圭的前景也是比较的暗淡。而佛得角却在首轮小组赛中大放异彩，因为他们零封逼平了强大的新科欧洲杯冠军西班牙，球队门将沃齐尼亚更是一战成名。在逼平西班牙之后，世界杯新军佛得角完全可以畅想一下晋级的可能，不过本场面对实力更强的乌拉圭，佛得角仍然需要注意自己的防守。

乌拉圭的实力肯定比西班牙差了不少，而且他们本身进攻端就十分乏力，本场面对防守不错的佛得角，他们想要取得更多的进球还是比较困难。而佛得角虽然要保证防守，但是仅仅拿到平局显然是很难晋级的。所以本场比赛球队必然也会出击，这就很可能留给乌拉圭人机会。因此，本场比赛看好乌拉圭小胜或者平局，一球小胜可能性较大。

plans.title: Messi, Messi, and Messi! 世界杯 阿根廷VS奥地利
plans.matchZh: 阿根廷 vs 奥地利

expert.name: Jarkko
expert.desc: 芬兰人，有自己投注模型，公开记录的2136场比赛场均盈利率超10%

plans.content:
The week started well, but there were a lot of late goals against us, like Germany's, and we can not be happy. A new week, and there is more information available now!

Argentina began the defence of their World Cup title with a 3–0 victory over Algeria. The biggest storyline of the match was once again Lionel Messi, who scored the first World Cup hat-trick of his career. However, the final scoreline slightly flatters the performance, as Algeria managed at times to challenge the reigning world champions before Messi’s individual brilliance ultimately decided the match. Note that Algeria did appeal against Messi after the game and is demanding a sanction for him: a suspension!

Austria, meanwhile, secured a 3–1 win over Jordan in their opening game. The result looks convincing, but the performance left plenty of room for improvement, and the full points would likely not have been secured without defensive errors from the opposition.

Betting. Argentina’s opening match largely matched expectations, while Austria’s display against a weaker-than-expected Jordan side raised more questions than it answered about the team’s true strength in this tournament. Argentina enter the match as roughly 65% favourites and are also likely to enjoy a slight crowd advantage in Dallas. Austria, who created few clear chances in their opener, are almost as likely to be held goalless as they are to score.

Looks likely, but the markets know that and the odds are nothing special.

Jordan v Algeria

Jordan left a positive impression in their World Cup debut, even though Austria ultimately took the points with a 3–1 victory. The tournament newcomer played fearlessly, created several dangerous situations, and remained level until the final 15 minutes. In the end, an own goal and a stoppage-time penalty widened the gap to a scoreline that did not fully reflect the flow of the match.

Algeria suffered a 0–3 defeat in their opening game against Argentina. The loss was expected, but the performance left a more positive impression than the result suggests. Algeria managed at times to trouble the reigning world champions and kept the match closer for longer than the final scoreline indicates.

Jordan showed in their opener that they are slightly more competitive than pre-tournament expectations suggested, but also exposed weaknesses, particularly in defending crosses and set pieces. Algeria are likely to target these areas in their game plan and enter the match as roughly 65% favourites based on their baseline level. If Jordan manage to improve their penalty-area defending, the match could become unexpectedly even. The expected goals total for the game sits at a relatively moderate level of around 2.6, which translates to the most likely results as 0-2, 1-2, 0-1, 1-3, 1-1

Good luck friends, remember to enjoy the football too, not only the betting part!



该文章通过有道机器翻译，仅供参考:

这周开局不错，但是我们在比赛的最后阶段进了很多球，就像德国一样，我们不能高兴。新的一周，现在有更多的信息！

阿根廷以3-0战胜阿尔及利亚，开始了他们的世界杯卫冕之旅。这场比赛最大的看点还是梅西，他上演了职业生涯第一个世界杯帽子戏法。然而，最后的比分让他们的表现略显得意，在梅西个人的才华最终决定比赛之前，阿尔及利亚数次向卫冕世界冠军发起挑战。请注意，阿尔及利亚确实在赛后对梅西提出了上诉，并要求对他进行制裁：停赛！

与此同时，奥地利在首场比赛中以3-1击败约旦。结果看起来令人信服，但表现还有很大的改进空间，如果没有对手的防守失误，满分可能不会得到保证。

押注。阿根廷队的首场比赛基本符合预期，而奥地利队对阵弱于预期的约旦队的表现引发了更多的问题，而不是回答了这支球队在本届比赛中的真正实力。阿根廷队以大约65%的热门率进入比赛，在达拉斯也可能享受到轻微的人群优势。奥地利在他们的首场比赛中几乎没有创造出明确的机会，他们几乎很有可能没有进球，也很有可能进球。

看起来很有可能，但市场知道这一点，而且这种可能性也没什么特别的。

约旦vs阿尔及利亚

乔丹在世界杯首秀中给人留下了积极的印象，尽管奥地利最终以3-1的比分取得了积分。这位锦标赛新人无所畏惧，创造了几次危险的局面，直到最后15分钟才保持平局。最终，一个乌龙球和补时阶段的点球扩大了比分差距，但这并不能完全反映比赛的流畅性。

阿尔及利亚在首场比赛中以0比3输给了阿根廷。输掉比赛是意料之中的，但他的表现给人留下了比结果更积极的印象。阿尔及利亚多次给卫冕世界冠军制造麻烦，并使比分接近的时间比最终比分显示的更长。

乔丹在揭幕战中表现出了比赛前预期更强的竞争力，但也暴露出了弱点，尤其是在防守传中和定位球方面。阿尔及利亚很可能在他们的比赛计划中瞄准这些区域，根据他们的基线水平，他们以大约65%的热门进入比赛。如果约旦能够改善他们的禁区防守，比赛可能会变得出乎意料的均匀。比赛的预期进球数在2.6个左右，这意味着最有可能的结果是0-2、1-2、0-1、1-3、1-1

祝你好运，朋友们，记得享受足球，而不仅仅是赌博的部分！

plans.title: Free, I agree with the markets!

expert.name: Jarkko
expert.desc: 芬兰人，有自己投注模型，公开记录的2136场比赛场均盈利率超10%

plans.content:
Belgium v Iran

Belgium had to settle for a 1–1 draw in their opening match against Egypt. Rudi García’s side predictably dominated possession but struggled with Egypt’s quick counterattacks, and for much of the game they were second best in terms of clear chances until the second half. Romelu Lukaku, who came off the bench, played a key role with his box presence in the build-up to the equaliser, and his return to the starting lineup against Iran would not be a surprise.

Iran opened their tournament with a 2–2 draw against New Zealand. The result was a disappointment for a side that entered the match as clear favourites, and, like Belgium, they also struggled to defend against fast transitions. However, in terms of overall flow, Iran were arguably closer to victory, as they controlled long periods of the match and created the more dangerous chances.

Neither side will be particularly satisfied with their opening-point return, as the group remains wide open. The pressure is arguably greater on Belgium, who came into the tournament as group favourites. Belgium are also around 70% favourites in this match. Still, the key question is whether they can better control turnovers than in their opener against Egypt, given that Iran are also most dangerous in transition. The game script should favour chances at both ends, making a high-scoring match an interesting betting angle.

One more thing: the problems of Iran being in the USA should not be underestimated; life has been made as difficult as possible, and they have to keep on coming and going to Mexico!

Spain v Saudi Arabia

Spain stumbled in their opening match with a goalless draw against Cape Verde. While a repeat of the same game state would still likely result in Spain winning most of the time, the reigning European champions lacked solutions to break down a low defensive block. Even if it was a bad performance from Spain, they would have won that match 90% of the time. The absence of Lamine Yamal from the starting lineup was particularly noticeable in terms of dribbling threat and penetration, as Spain were unable to stretch Cape Verde’s defensive line in their usual manner.

Saudi Arabia, meanwhile, earned a valuable 1–1 draw in their opening match against Uruguay. Although possession and chances largely favoured Uruguay as expected, Saudi Arabia defended in a disciplined and committed manner. Goalkeeper Mohammed Al Owais, in particular, was in excellent form and stood out as the team’s most important individual performer.

There is no need to overreact to Spain’s somewhat underwhelming start. Changes to the lineup may be expected, particularly on the flanks, even if Lamine Yamal is not yet ready to start. Saudi Arabia managed to frustrate Uruguay for long periods, but the challenge against Spain is significantly greater. The quality gap between the teams is substantial, with Spain entering as heavy favourites and expected to generate close to three team goals in terms of xG. Saudi Arabia will rely mainly on set pieces and counterattacks for any scoring opportunities, but failing to score is more likely than finding the net.

Again, the odds are far from generous or wrong, but a comfortable win for Spain is the most likely outcome!

Good luck!



该文章通过有道机器翻译，仅供参考:

比利时vs伊朗

比利时在首战与埃及的比赛中只得1-1战平。鲁迪García的球队可以预见地控制了控球权，但在埃及的快速反击中挣扎，在比赛的大部分时间里，直到下半场，他们在射门机会方面都是第二好的。替补出场的卢卡库在扳平比分的过程中发挥了关键作用，他在对阵伊朗的比赛中重返首发阵容并不令人意外。

伊朗队以2-2战平新西兰队开场。这场比赛的结果令人失望，这支球队在进入比赛时显然是夺冠热门，而且，和比利时一样，他们在防守快速转变时也遇到了困难。然而，就整体流畅度而言，伊朗队可以说更接近胜利，因为他们控制了比赛的长时间，创造了更多的危险机会。

任何一方都不会对他们的开门红感到特别满意，因为该集团仍处于开放状态。比利时的压力可以说更大，他们是小组热门。比利时在这场比赛中也有70%左右的夺冠热门。不过，关键的问题是他们能否比首场对阵埃及时更好地控制失误，因为伊朗在换防时也是最危险的。比赛脚本应该有利于双方的机会，使高比分比赛成为一个有趣的赌博角度。

还有一件事：伊朗在美国的问题不应该被低估；生活已经变得非常困难了，他们不得不不断地往返于墨西哥！

西班牙vs沙特阿拉伯

西班牙队在首场比赛中遭遇惨败，0比0战平佛得角。尽管同样的比赛状态在大多数情况下仍可能导致西班牙获胜，但卫冕欧洲冠军缺乏打破低防线的解决方案。即使西班牙队表现不佳，他们也有90%的机会赢得比赛。拉明·亚马尔在首发阵容中的缺席在盘带威胁和突破方面尤为明显，因为西班牙无法像往常一样延伸佛得角的防线。

与此同时，沙特阿拉伯在首场比赛中1-1战平乌拉圭。尽管一如预期，控球权和机会在很大程度上有利于乌拉圭队，但沙特阿拉伯的防守纪律严明，态度坚定。尤其是门将穆罕默德·阿尔·奥维斯，他的状态非常好，是全队最重要的个人球员。

没有必要对西班牙有点平淡无奇的开局反应过度。阵容的变化是可以预料的，特别是在侧翼，即使亚马尔还没有准备好首发。沙特阿拉伯在很长一段时间内挫败了乌拉圭，但对西班牙的挑战要大得多。两队之间的实力差距是巨大的，西班牙队是夺冠热门，预计将在xG方面创造近3个团队进球。沙特阿拉伯将主要依靠定位球和反击来获得得分机会，但不进球的可能性比进球的可能性更大。

再一次，赔率远非慷慨或错误，但西班牙轻松获胜是最有可能的结果！

好运！

bo.note: 娱乐性串关 · 命中率/EV用市场去水q · 模型仅⚑风味 · EV恒负如实 · 国际盘抽水高(波胆~30%) · 小样本不可外推
